posts.text: Israel’s politicians are letting their people down. Voters need to hear hard truths. Israel’s founding generations grasped that wars must have limits. Israelis must recognise that, even after October 7th, those limits still exist https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/04/23/the-high-price-of-forever-wars?taid=69ef2ef44d70480001631d8b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
I keep hearing about scammers using WhatsApp or this platform, impersonating me and charging for investment advice and stock tips. Etc.  

I don’t have any paid services.  I don’t contact people on WhatsApp and give stock tips. 

Please report and block imposters.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
